name: Lyra
lore: She is a bow user who can also do some hand-to-hand combat when needed. Her true power lies in her usage of Red Ice—a unique, volatile mix of ice and lava that freezes enemies on contact and burns fiercely if broken.

skills.description: Does ATK-scaled damage to one enemy and applies [decay.stacks] Decay for [decay.duration] turns.
Does ATK-scaled as [pierce.value]% pierce damage to one enemy

ultimate.description: Does ATK-scaled damage to all enemies and pierces [pierce.value]% DEF.

passive.name: First Action: Unbreakable Ice
passive.description: When Lyra acts first in a turn, gains +50% DEF for 1 turn. This buff is unstackable and uncancellable.
